testimonials.review1: Excellent food and fast service! I love the variety of dishes. Simply great!
testimonials.review2: The food was incredibly delicious! Delivery was super fast and the service very friendly.
testimonials.review3: Fresh ingredients and perfect seasoning! Every order so far has been a hit. Highly recommended!
testimonials.review4: Top quality and great value for money. The food arrived hot and tasted fantastic.

moreDetails.title: More about me
moreDetails.p1: My name is Mohammad El Zein, I am 22 years old and from Lebanon. In October 2022 I moved to Germany to start my computer science studies at TU Dortmund and to deepen my passion for technology and software development. After an intensive year of learning German, in which I successfully passed the telc C1 exam, I am now in the fifth semester of my studies.
moreDetails.p2: I realized early on that computer science excites me – especially solving complex problems, developing new features and understanding how systems work internally. Through my studies and many personal projects I have built a broad range of programming skills in C, C++, Python, Java, SQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
moreDetails.p3: I am particularly proud of the projects I have implemented on my own or together with others. For example, I developed my own portfolio website and am currently working with a friend on a food web app for a restaurant, where users can browse the menu online and place orders using a test payment integration. We use modern technologies such as React, Spring Boot, MongoDB and Stripe.
moreDetails.p4: Alongside programming I have developed a solid understanding of software architecture, requirements engineering and project planning. As part of my studies I worked with UML diagrams, BPMN models and systematic software development. In addition, I gained experience with database systems and Java through a backend internship in my home country.
moreDetails.p5: I also gained practical experience in a professional environment through my work in our family business (Western Union) and as a postal worker at DHL. There I learned to handle data in a structured, reliable and responsible way – for example when managing customer data in Excel or analyzing transactions in Power BI.
moreDetails.p6: Currently I am focusing intensively on cloud technologies and preparing for the Microsoft Azure Fundamentals certification. In the long term I want to specialize in cloud and DevOps engineering in order to implement exciting software projects and continuously expand my knowledge.
moreDetails.p7: I love learning new things, taking on challenges and turning my ideas into working software. With this website I not only want to present my projects, but also show that I am highly motivated to grow professionally and work in a hands-on environment.

footer.aboutText: We are two hardworking and ambitious Computer Science students at TU Dortmund University with a strong passion for Information Technology. We independently developed this full-stack website using React, Spring Boot, MongoDB and Stripe, and enhanced it with AI-powered features to further strengthen our technical skills and prepare for our professional careers.
